response.global_analysis: The audio features the song 'PPPP PaPiPuPePo' followed by an MC segment. The Reference JSON lyrics only contain a small snippet of the song, so I am relying heavily on the audio and on-screen text for the song section. The MC segment is transcribed and translated based on the speaker's (Natsuiro Matsuri) dialogue. Timestamps are precisely aligned with vocal cues.

subtitles.english: With a Pa-Pi-Pu-Pe-Po feel, enjoy poppingly

subtitles.original: あれ これ どれ それ 楽しいね ハイハイ！
subtitles.english: That, this, which, that, it's fun! Hi-hai!

subtitles.original: ぱぴぷぺぽな感じで POPにエンジョイ
subtitles.english: With a Pa-Pi-Pu-Pe-Po feel, enjoy poppingly

subtitles.original: あれ これ どれ それ 楽しいね ハイハイ！
subtitles.english: That, this, which, that, it's fun! Hi-hai!

subtitles.original: ぱぴぷぺぽ ぱぴぷぺぽ ぱぴぷぺぽ ぱぴぷぺぽ
Poppin', POP!
みんなー ゲストパートどうだったー？
subtitles.english: Everyone, how was the guest part?

subtitles.original: かーわいかったー？ ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Was it cute? Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: ということでね、すごい続けてやってしまったんですが、
subtitles.english: And so, we did them all in a row,

subtitles.original: まず『Sakura Apparition』はAZKiちゃんとルーナちゃんとリリカに出てもらいました。
subtitles.english: First, for "Sakura Apparition," I had AZKi-chan, Luna-chan, and Ririka join me.

subtitles.original: なんかすごい「サクラ」というか春っぽいね、ピンクーな感じのメンバーを呼びました。
subtitles.english: I invited members who give off a real "Sakura" or spring-like, pink feeling.

subtitles.original: リリカすごい頑張ってたよなぁ、
subtitles.english: Ririka really worked hard, didn't she?

subtitles.original: すごいね練習中も「あぁ～できない～！」って言いながら頑張ってたリリカ。
subtitles.english: Even during practice, she was saying "Ah, I can't do it!" while doing her best.

subtitles.original: そして次『逃げない』ね。
『逃げない』はちょっと結構古めの曲なんですけど、
subtitles.english: "Nigenai" is a bit of an older song,

subtitles.original: まつりがすごいすごい大好きで、一番推していた、ゆるめるモ！さんの楽曲で、
subtitles.english: but it's a song by You'll Melt More!, whom Matsuri loves so very much and was a huge fan of.

subtitles.original: あのー、ここで歌えて、すごく嬉しかったです。ありがとうございますね。
subtitles.english: I was so happy to be able to sing it here. Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: そして『特急しらさぎ』は、もう難しかった！すごい難しかったんだから！
subtitles.english: And "Tokkyu Shirasagi" was just so hard! It was incredibly difficult!

subtitles.original: だってさ、1番と2番さ、
subtitles.english: Because, you know, the first and second verses,

subtitles.original: あのサビの振りも違うしさ、めっちゃ難しかったよ！
subtitles.english: the choreography for the chorus is different. It was so hard!

subtitles.original: ≠ME（イコラブ）さんの曲は毎回難しいけど、すごい踊ってて楽しいでございますね。はい。
subtitles.english: Songs by ≠ME (and =LOVE) are always hard, but they're so much fun to dance to. Yes.

subtitles.original: そして『ぱぴぷぺぽPOP』。
これ、あのー、ずっとこうやってるから、すごい疲れて、あの、汗だくになった。
subtitles.english: Since we're doing this the whole time, it's exhausting and I got all sweaty.

subtitles.original: すごかったよ、練習中の時も汗だくすぎて、
subtitles.english: It was intense. Even during practice I was too sweaty,

subtitles.original: 「ちょっと待って、ちょっと疲れた...」とか言って、
subtitles.english: saying "Wait a sec, I'm a bit tired..."

subtitles.original: みんなでわちゃわちゃしながら練習もしましたけど、すごい楽しかったでございます。
subtitles.english: We had fun practicing all together like that, though.

subtitles.original: そして、ちょっと紹介できてなかった、こちらのステージ！じゃーん！かわいい！
subtitles.english: And, I hadn't been able to introduce it yet, this stage! Tada! It's cute!

subtitles.original: すごい可愛くね、作っていただきました。
subtitles.english: They made it look so cute for me.
